Low-End Device Optimization Report

This document outlines the technical fixes and optimizations implemented to ensure stability and compatibility on older Android devices (Android 7-11).

Critical Fix

1. White Screen on Android 7-11

Issue: The app would launch to a white screen on older devices because the WebView did not support modern JavaScript syntax (ES2020) generated by the default build process.

Solution:

  • Installed @vitejs/plugin-legacy to handle transpilation for older browsers.
  • Configured vite.config.ts to target android >= 7 and chrome >= 60.
  • This generates specific "legacy" chunks that are automatically loaded by older WebViews.
Critical Fix

2. RangeError: maximumFractionDigits

Issue: A crash occurred with RangeError: maximumFractionDigits value is out of range. This happens on some Android WebViews when maximumFractionDigits: 0 is passed to Intl.NumberFormat while the default minimumFractionDigits (usually 2 for currency) is higher.

Solution:

  • Updated DashboardHome.tsx, DashboardStats.tsx, and RevenueChart.tsx.
  • Explicitly set minimumFractionDigits: 0 wherever maximumFractionDigits: 0 was used to ensure valid range boundaries.
Cleanup

3. Logcat Error Cleanup

Issue: The application log was flooded with "Unable to open asset URL" errors, causing performance overhead and noise.

Solution:

  • Favicon: Removed reference to non-existent favicon.svg in index.html.
  • Templates: Updated local-template-service.ts to stop attempting to fetch templates 100003-100008, which had been deleted. The service now correctly only checks for the existing 2 templates.
Configuration

4. SocialCalc Image Paths

Issue: Logcat was flooded with "Unable to open asset URL" errors for SocialCalc images because the configuration pointed to www/assets/images/ (legacy path) instead of the Vite root /assets/images/.

Solution:

  • Updated SocialCalc source files to use /assets/images/.
  • Created public/assets/images directory.
  • Asset Cleanup: Removed unused SVG icons and duplicate "copy" artifacts.
  • Restored Icons: Renamed original sc-*.gif files to sc_*.gif to match the code configuration, so real icons are now displayed instead of placeholders.
UI Improvement

5. Header Icons

Issue: User requested minimal, custom SVG icons for the Invoice Page header (Save, Share, Menu) instead of the stock IonIcons.

Solution:

  • Created src/components/InvoicePage/HeaderIcons.tsx with custom SVG components.
  • Replaced IonIcon components in InvoicePage.tsx.
  • Fixed a duplicate import lint error introduced during the process.
Compatibility

6. 16KB Page Alignment (Android 15+)

Issue: The APK failed validation for Android 15+ devices because libsqlcipher.so was not 16KB page aligned ("LOAD segments not aligned"). This is a requirement for the new 16KB page size kernel support.

Solution:

  • Added android:extractNativeLibs="true" to AndroidManifest.xml.
  • Why: This forces the system to extract native libraries to disk upon installation rather than mapping them directly from the APK. This serves as a valid workaround for debug builds to bypass the strict alignment requirement without needing to recompile the native library itself.

Generated by Antigravity
